statement_sha256: run with --print-statement-sha to obtain this value
artifact_sha256: SHA-256 of the immutable replay certificate
certificate_sha256: SHA-256 of the semantic validator certificate
scope_sha256: must equal the exact locked statement SHA-256
attestor_key_id: issued by the trusted validation gateway
attestation: HMAC-SHA256 issued by the trusted validation gateway
run_contract_id: SHA-256 run_contract_id from the exact saved manifest
run_context_id: SHA-256 run_context_id from the exact saved manifest
